location: Rare (2% at 100 Discovery) drop from axe-wielding Misbegotten. Easiest source: a sleeping Misbegotten across the bridge from the Beside the Rampart Gaol grace at Castle Morne, Weeping Peninsula.
tactics: From Beside the Rampart Gaol grace, cross the bridge — the Misbegotten is asleep on the left, giving you a free critical riposte to start the fight
Only a 2% drop chance, so expect to reset at the grace and repeat several times
Backup farm: two more axe Misbegotten are down the stairs north of the Windmill Village grace
A third source exists in Cave of the Forlorn in the Consecrated Snowfield, but that's a late-game area not worth using for an early farm
lore: The weapon of choice for the abused Misbegotten, this axe's unusually long handle lets its wielder put their whole body — and, the game implies, years of pent-up resentment — behind every swing.

builds.name: Strength hyperarmor trader
builds.why: D/D scaling with above-average two-handed hyperarmor, good for trading hits directly in melee.

builds.name: War Cry bruiser
builds.why: Default War Cry skill for burst damage windows.
